name: CloudAuthor devcontainer
onCreateCommand: curl -sSL https://aspire.dev/install.sh | bash && curl --proto '=https' --tlsv1.2 -sSf https://just.systems/install.sh | bash -s -- --to /home/vscode/.local/bin && curl -LsSf https://astral.sh/uv/install.sh | sh
postCreateCommand: echo 'export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH"' >> /home/vscode/.zshrc && npm install -g @github/copilot @bradygaster/squad-cli @vscode/vsce && uv tool install mcp-server-fetch && (cd /tmp && git clone https://github.com/swigerb/squad-pod.git && cd squad-pod && npm install && cd webview-ui && npm install && cd .. && npm run build && echo y | vsce package --allow-missing-repository --baseImagesUrl https://raw.githubusercontent.com/swigerb/squad-pod/master/ --baseContentUrl https://raw.githubusercontent.com/swigerb/squad-pod/master/ && code --install-extension squad-pod-0.1.0.vsix || true)
postStartCommand: if [ -f tmp/localhost.crt ]; then sudo cp tmp/localhost.crt /usr/local/share/ca-certificates/localhost.crt && sudo update-ca-certificates; fi
